name: World Wide Axle
description: World Wide axles have 2 sliders attached to them, engineered for torque transmission and long-term durability across heavy-duty tractor applications.

name: Chassis
description: KBI provides customized chassis solutions enabling OEMs in commercial vehicle and construction sectors to achieve higher efficiency, safety, and productivity.

name: Pedals
description: We specialize in the fabrication of various pedals for numerous clients across automotive and agricultural sectors with precision tolerances.

name: Galvanised Steel Tapes
description: Tapes widely used as protective covers for residential underground wiring — resistant to corrosion, mechanical damage, and environmental stress.

name: Galvanised Wires & Strips
description: Wires and strips used as electromagnetic shields for underground cables, providing protection against mechanical and chemical damage.

name: Bracket Assembly Steering Mounting
description: Designed and manufactured to endure heavy-duty applications, ensuring structural stability and long service life in demanding environments.

name: Bracket Seat Belt
description: Engineered for operator safety, comfort, and ergonomics by following global standards. Each product undergoes rigorous validation and testing.

name: Dash Panel
description: Precision-formed dash panels delivering structural integrity, aesthetic finish, and fitment accuracy across major OEM platforms.

name: Hydraulic Elbow
description: KBI's hydraulic elbows combine strength, precision, and durability — playing a critical role in ensuring reliability of heavy equipment in the field.

name: Tube Exhaust
description: High-temperature resistant exhaust tube assemblies engineered for excavator applications, built to withstand harsh operating conditions.

name: Bracket Wiper
description: Precision-stamped wiper bracket assemblies that ensure secure fitment and reliable wiper operation across a range of passenger vehicle platforms.

name: Running Board
description: Robust running boards for agricultural tractors, manufactured with high-tensile steel to provide safe access and structural support in rugged field conditions.
